title: Polypogon viridis
taxonomy: Polypogon viridis is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It belongs to the subfamily Pooideae, which is a large subfamily of grasses. The genus Polypogon is a small group of grasses, with Polypogon viridis being one of the species within it. This species is native to Europe, North Africa, and parts of Asia. Polypogon viridis is also known as green meadow-grass.
uses: Polypogon viridis, also known as green fallover grass, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
